project.name: my-mind-node
project.description: pnpm workspace for a DOM-free mind map core, React Flow editor/viewer, optional import/export adapters, examples, docs, and agent harness assets.

runtime.version: Node.js 22 in CI; local Node version is not pinned

functional_scenarios.name: playground_import_edit_export_loop
functional_scenarios.description: Open the Vite playground, import or edit JSON/Markdown/Mermaid, render the canvas, and export through the adapter package.
steps_hint: Use the data pane to import structured text
Verify the React Flow canvas renders nodes and toolbar actions remain available

functional_scenarios.name: package_quality_gate
functional_scenarios.description: Run architecture lint, TypeScript checks, unit tests, build, and bundle budget checks before landing package changes.

assumptions: No database, cache, broker, Docker, Kubernetes, or runtime environment variables were detected.
The playground Vite server on 127.0.0.1:5187 is the default executable target because Playwright uses it.
Node.js 22 is used in GitHub Actions; package.json currently only pins pnpm.
todos: Optionally add an engines.node field or .node-version if local Node version drift becomes a recurring issue.
